comments: Including a preference for all genders would have been nice :)
in the first few profiles i didn't see that there were 2 things they like and 2 they don't like. so might be that the first 3/4 clicks are a little off
I mainly looked at the interests and not the sliders above
I think i made some decisions with age as well, like 42 or even 33 is way too old
The age was a factor that influenced my decision i think.
Age was a confound as it was the first thing I checked and I believe had a bigger impact on my choices than some of the other things.

`to me, the age plays a big role, sometimes the personality traits were great but if the age was too high then i wouldnt date them. `im not sure if this influenced the model as well. `moreover, the interests were also quite important, however this isn't in the model as well. `If it was a real model, I would want to have this taken into account as well.
